release_notes:
Version 1.3.0:
- get_page_info now lists all objects on the active page (ref, type, text, coordinates and sizes in mm).
- Dimensions and positions are automatically converted and formatted in millimeters (mm).
- export_svg now attaches rendered PNG preview images and SVG XML directly to tool responses.
- Text objects (cdrTextShape) now report their exact text content and formatting.
